'''Sleeth''' was a [[Molavaran]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]], whose [[Parent/Legends|mother]] [[Magon]] was the reigning crime-lady of the city [[Malcraan]]. He often troubled the local [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] [[Byrom]].

==Biography==
When Sleeth arrived at the farm to ask for protection money one time, he was chased away and humiliated by [[Darca Nyl]]. Soon Sleeth's mother arrived with the intention of exacting revenge upon Byrom. Sleeth was embarrassed by his mother's treatment of him as little better than a child, but his embarrassment did not last long, as the bandits were run off by a caravan of Molavarans led by [[Tooth (Molavaran)|Tooth]].
